provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Public Recreation Grounds (Arusha Municipality) Order.

Each of the areas of public land in Arusha Municipality described in the Schedule is hereby declared to be a public recreation ground for the purposes of the Public Recreation Grounds Act. Schedule All that area of land in Block "E" Njiro, within Arusha Municipality identified as Plot Nos. 389 and 390 on survey plan No. D5229/12 and Plot Nos. 392 and 394 on survey plan No. D5229/111, held by the Director of Surveys and Mapping, Ministry of Lands, Housing and Urban Development. All that area of land in Block "F" Njiro, within Arusha Municipality identified as Plot Nos. 666 on survey plan No. D 5 229/21 and Plot Nos. 658, 660 and 662 on survey plan No. D 5 229/22, held by the Director of Surveys and Mapping, Ministry of Lands, Housing and Urban Development. All that area of land in Block "J" Njiro, within Arusha Municipality identified as Plot Nos. 426 on survey plan No. D 5 229/45, held by the Director of Surveys and Mapping, Ministry of Lands, Housing and Urban Development. All that area of land in Block "H" Njiro, within Arusha Municipality identified as plot Nos. 649, 652, 653, 677, 687, 688 and 689 on survey plan No. D 25 229/57, held by the Director of Surveys and Mapping, Ministry of Lands, Housing and Urban Development. All that area of land in Block "W" corridor, within Arusha Municipality identified as Plot Nos. 64 and 71 on survey plan No. D 5 93/1, held by the Director of Surveys and Mapping, Ministry of Lands, Housing and Urban Development.
